title: Long and short text column info added to "updates" on Kanban
excerpt: The request I have is to show all of the long text information in the “updates” area when I open a task in Kanban. Right now I only see a limited amount of information displayed when I open a task in Kanban.

posts.author: LDillon1980 (Luke Dillon)
posts.cookedHtml: The request I have is to show all of the long text information in the “updates” area when I open a task in Kanban. Right now I only see a limited amount of information displayed when I open a task in Kanban.
